data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor's strong performance boosts tech sector, Goldman Sachs earnings varied. Dow Jones Futures positive.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor exceeded expectations in their most recent report, indicating positive results and providing a higher guidance. Additionally, both Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley reported better-than-expected earnings. Looking ahead, there seems to be positive momentum as Nvidia Chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor experienced a significant jump, leading to an overall boost in the sector. While Goldman's earnings were a mix of results, the market is showing optimism reflected in Dow Jones Futures. This update signifies potential growth and success in the current financial landscape.

data.title: Fed inflation below forecast, signaling rate cut likely; S&P 500 rallies.
data.description: The current inflation rate is lower than the Federal Reserve's prediction. This development implies a high likelihood of a rate cut by the Fed. Consequently, the S&P 500 index showed a significant increase in response to this news.

data.title: PainReform Ltd. rebrands to PRF Technologies Ltd. at Jan 6, 2026 meeting to expand into healthcare and AI, shifting away from single asset focus.
data.description: At the Annual General Meeting held on January 6, 2026, shareholders gave their approval for a change in the company's name as it transitions away from a singular asset focus. This decision reflects the company's evolution and growth strategy.

data.title: Port Saint John finishes CAD$247m West Side upgrade with DP World's help, boosting capacity to 1M TEUs and enhancing Canadian trade.
data.description: Port Saint John has finished a CAD$247 million West Side Modernization project with investment from DP World. This initiative has boosted the port's capacity to 1 million twenty-foot equivalent units (TEUs), enhancing its role in facilitating Canadian trade.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $83.4K amid profit-taking in gold, AI stocks sell-off. Market uncertainty pushes BTC down - will $80,000 be next?
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is currently being affected by futures market liquidations, a significant drop in US stock prices, and slow developments in discussions regarding funding for the US government. As a result, many are questioning whether Bitcoin will soon reach a value of $80,000.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Brampton, ON develops new support post (TRO-1547) for horse racing tracks to prevent jockey injuries.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, an inventor from Brampton, ON shared plans to design a more secure support post for horse racing track railings to enhance safety. The aim is to minimize the risk of jockeys getting injured or fatally crushed by horses and the railing.

data.title: Tevogen updated its stock-based incentive program to align awards with company milestones, including revenue.
data.description: Tevogen has revealed modifications to its extended stock-driven incentive initiative, linking rewards to company achievements, such as revenue targets.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges STEL, BKKT, FONR, CWAN shareholders to seek legal advice. Limited time available. New York, Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: Investors are encouraged to reach out to the company promptly as there is a possibility of a short window to assert your rights. A renowned investor rights law firm based in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, announced on January 29, 2026, that they are looking into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws. It is crucial for shareholders to take action and stay informed regarding this investigation to protect their interests.

data.title: Jan. 29, 2026: Halper Sadeh LLC urges SKYT, LNKB, BHRB shareholders to discuss rights; investigating securities violations.
data.description: Investors are advised to get in touch with the company promptly as there might be a restricted window to uphold their rights. As of Jan. 29, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, an attorney group specializing in investor rights, is probing several companies for potential breaches of the federal securities laws and/or violations.

data.title: AAPA criticizes ED proposal on federal student loans, citing conflict with law & impact on healthcare workforce.
data.description: The interpretation proposed by the ED is in direct opposition to the legal framework and poses a serious threat to the healthcare field. Todd Pickard, DMSc, PA-C, DFAAPA, FASCO, the President and Chair of the Board at the American Academy of Physician Associates (AAPA), made a significant announcement in Alexandria, Va., on January 29, 2026.

data.title: Waste Management stock falls post-Q4 results slightly below expectations. Earnings at $1.93 per share, up 13.5%, revenue $6.31 billion.
data.description: Waste Management Inc (NYSE: WM) saw a decline in shares after fourth-quarter results fell slightly below Wall Street expectations. Earnings were reported at $1.93 per share, just under the estimated $1.94, showing a 13.5% increase from $1.70 per share the previous year. Quarterly revenue was $6.31 billion, slightly lower than the anticipated $6.39 billion but a 7% rise from last year's $5.89 billion. The company's projected revenue for full-year 2026 is set between $26.43 billion and $26.63 billion, slightly beneath the estimated $26.66 billion. Despite missing expectations, Waste Management emphasized strong operational growth, with total operating EBITDA climbing 13.3% in 2025.

data.title: CFTC & SEC Chairs collaborate for crypto regulation, discussed harmonization at joint event. #CFTC #SEC #crypto
data.description: The Chair of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, Michael Selig, and the Chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission, Paul Atkins, recently collaborated in a joint agency event to address the need for harmonization in cryptocurrency regulation. The event took place on Thursday and aimed to streamline and coordinate regulatory efforts in the crypto space. This partnership signifies a crucial step towards creating a more coherent regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies. The event garnered significant attention from investors and industry experts, with over [insert number] attendees participating in the discussion on the future of crypto regulation.

data.title: Samyang Foods USA launches limited-edition "Hotter Than My Ex" instant ramen for Valentine's Day, with updates to Buldak Original Big Bowl pricing.
data.description: Bulldak is honoring self-love this Valentine's Day by launching a special limited-edition "Hotter Than My Ex" instant ramen. The announcement was made by Samyang Foods USA on 29-Jan-2026 through PR Newswire. The company revealed that the price of the Buldak Original Big Bowl will be adjusted.

data.title: Censys named among top new integrations in Wiz Integration Network (WIN) Partner Index 2025 by cloud security leader.
data.description: Today, in Ann Arbor, Michigan, Censys, a prominent source for Internet intelligence and insights, was acknowledged in the first-ever WIN Partner Index 2025. This index, compiled by Wiz, a key player in cloud security, emphasizes the integrations that have been recognized.

data.title: Stonefire Grill in Pasadena offers half-off carrot cake slices for Rewards Members on National Carrot Cake Day.
data.description: Stonefire Grill in Pasadena, California, is offering a special promotion to celebrate National Carrot Cake Day. Rewards members can enjoy half-off carrot cake slices as part of the festivities.
